title: Tennessee Whiskey: The Dean Dillon Story
original_title: Tennessee Whiskey: The Dean Dillon Story
overview: Dean Dillon has written hit songs for George Strait, George Jones, Kenny Chesney, Brooks and Dunn, Toby Keith, LeeAnn Womack, and many more for over 4 decades.
